design_basis.summary: DESIGN.md was read fully. Relevant basis: gemini-bloom is not a RedisBloom drop-in replacement; RDB-family compatibility is scoped to Redis 6.2.17 + RedisBloom v2.4.20; SCANDUMP/LOADCHUNK, command-AOF no-preamble, RESP3, BF.DEBUG, config differences, no delete support, EXPANSION 1 query-cost risk, AOF rewrite OOM skip-key behavior, and RedisBloom/Redis 8 same-instance mutual exclusion are explicit design boundaries or known limits.
Stage 00 requires all known limits to be reflected in the final report, including deletion unsupported, EXPANSION 1 query cost, AOF rewrite OOM skip-key behavior, and same-instance mutual exclusion.

actions: Added explicit DESIGN_LIMIT rows in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/01_DESIGN约束与结论对齐.md.
Added an operational limits section in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/04_RedisBloom兼容性矩阵.md.
Updated report self-audit and coverage matrix to state the known limits are now visible and not treated as product defects.
check_findings_disposition.notes: The finding is valid as a report-completeness gap. No product defect reclassification was made.

actions: Added RedisBloom configuration-difference row covering gemini loadmodule EXPANSION, RedisBloom CF_MAX_EXPANSIONS, config EXPANSION 0, and command EXPANSION 0 behavior.
Marked RedisBloom module-load config comparison as NOT_VERIFIED in doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6/08_测试覆盖与未覆盖.md because no new RedisBloom runtime comparison was run.
check_findings_disposition.notes: Treated as DESIGN_INTENDED / PARTIAL coverage, with runtime RedisBloom module-load behavior explicitly not newly verified.

actions: No final-report body change required; existing GBV6-00-001 remains the report-level finding for the absent checked-in fixture path.
Recorded in this worker result that Stage 12 path PASS wording should be separated if Stage 12 artifacts are regenerated.
check_findings_disposition.notes: The final report already carries the missing fixture as an open P3 issue. Stage 12 evidence wording was not regenerated in this worker pass.

commands_or_checks_run.command: sed -n '1,240p' modules/gemini-bloom/DESIGN.md; sed -n '241,480p' modules/gemini-bloom/DESIGN.md; sed -n '481,760p' modules/gemini-bloom/DESIGN.md
commands_or_checks_run.summary: Read the full 700-line DESIGN.md in chunks.
Read the full check handoff and dispositioned CHECK-001 through CHECK-003.

commands_or_checks_run.command: rg -n "不支持删除|删除|EXPANSION 1.*查询|查询成本|AOF rewrite.*分配失败|skip-key|跳过.*key|CF_MAX_EXPANSIONS|配置差异|同实例|互斥|EXPANSION 0|RedisBloom / Redis 8|module load 配置差异" doc/code_review/gemini-bloom/v6 --glob '!**/agent_handoff/**'
commands_or_checks_run.summary: Confirmed the final report set now contains explicit coverage for the DESIGN known-limit and config-difference terms, excluding handoff files.
Confirmed source path logs AOF rewrite allocation failure and returns before emitting LOADCHUNK header.
Confirmed DESIGN and source references for config EXPANSION support, config EXPANSION 0 rejection, command EXPANSION behavior, and CF_MAX_EXPANSIONS as a RedisBloom Cuckoo Filter config difference.
Confirmed registered command set contains no BF.DEL or BF.DELETE support and matches DESIGN command list.

report_changes.summary: Added explicit DESIGN_LIMIT/DESIGN_OPERATIONAL_LIMIT rows and design-intended notes for config differences, deletion unsupported, EXPANSION 1 query cost, AOF rewrite OOM skip-key behavior, and RedisBloom/Redis 8 same-instance mutual exclusion.
Added module-load config-difference row, command EXPANSION 0 detail, operational limits section, and explicit mutual-exclusion wording.
Added Stage 13 known-limit coverage note and a NOT_VERIFIED row for RedisBloom module-load config comparison.
Updated self-audit confirmations to include the newly covered DESIGN known limits and note the unrun RedisBloom config comparison.
Added Stage 13 worker recheck process and evidence links.

remaining_blocked_or_not_verified.notes: No new RedisBloom server/module-load comparison was run for EXPANSION or CF_MAX_EXPANSIONS; report classifies this as DESIGN_INTENDED / PARTIAL based on DESIGN and source/static evidence.
ACL DRYRUN, sanitizer/valgrind, cluster ASK, high-memory capacity=2^30, Stage 10 command-AOF rerun, kill_during_bgsave, and direct Stage 07 bloom_rdb_test rerun remain as previously reported.
CHECK-003 was accepted as an artifact wording concern, but the final report already carries GBV6-00-001. Stage 12 evidence files were not regenerated.

review_focus: Verify the new report wording keeps DESIGN_INTENDED and DESIGN_LIMIT items distinct from product defects.
Verify CHECK-001 and CHECK-002 acceptance criteria are satisfied by final report files, not only by handoff files.
Verify existing P1/P2/P3 findings and confidence degradations remain visible and unchanged.
Verify the NOT_VERIFIED RedisBloom module-load config comparison is acceptable for this worker scope.
